  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "Powershell used to add a firewall rule allowing incoming connections for python.exe located in a user's AppData directory, which is unusual for legitimate system applications and can be indicative of malware or a backdoor.",

    "powershell",
    "netsh",
    "firewall rule",
    "add rule",
    "allow incoming",
    "python.exe",
    "appdata"
  ]
